purpose: The thesis- and Excel-faithful DES environment used for the 1-to-1 PPO-vs-static comparison (Idea 1). All policies are evaluated in THIS environment under common random numbers. Source of truth: supply_chain.config.THESIS_FAITHFUL_PROTOCOL.

ret_fidelity_fixes.note: These four fixes brought endogenous R1 ReT from ~0.20 (30x off) to the Garrido scale (0.0044 vs Excel 0.0063).

ppo_action_observation.action_space: Discrete(18) = [6 inventory levels x 3 shift levels] (Track A)

known_limitations.r2_cf11_20_endogenous: Under the R2-only gate (CF11-20, R14 excluded), the endogenous DES does not reproduce Garrido's R2 ReT (under-attribution of R22/R23/R24 event->order). This is a documented limitation. It does NOT affect the training regimes (current/increased/severe) because R14 is ubiquitous there, so ~no no-risk orders exist and the R2 fill-rate branch is empty.
known_limitations.ctj_rpj_tail: The endogenous CTj/RPj extreme tail (p99) is ~2x Garrido's; affects tail-risk metrics (CVaR/p95), not the mean ReT.
known_limitations.excel_ret_quirk: Raw Excel ReT is low-valued and dominated by the disruption branch; used as an EVALUATION bar, not trained on directly (Reward A).
